dialog.title: What's an Instant App?
dialog.content: Instant Apps deliver a native experience without the need for a full app download, harnessing superior device signal detection for precise identity checks. Unlike web platforms, they offer a swifter and more intuitive ID document flow, ensuring efficient selfie and doc uploads, all while maintaining a consistent and reliable user experience.
dialog.demo: Here’s a demo so you can try it yourself:
dialog.instructions: Use your camera app or QR code reader on your phone.
dialog.disclaimer: This is just a preview and no real data will be collected.

dialog.title: What's an App Clip?
dialog.content: App Clip deliver a native experience without the need for a full app download, harnessing superior device signal detection for precise identity checks. Unlike web platforms, they offer a swifter and more intuitive ID document flow, ensuring efficient selfie and doc uploads, all while maintaining a consistent and reliable user experience.
dialog.demo: Here’s a demo so you can try it yourself:
dialog.instructions: Use your camera app or QR code reader on your phone.
dialog.disclaimer: This is just a preview and no real data will be collected.

who-to-onboard.subtitle: This helps us better recommend which data to collect.

auth.title: Auth
auth.description: Authentication allows your users to create credentials to sign up/log in to your platform
auth.disabled-tooltip: You are not configured to create production Auth playbooks. Feel free to continue in sandbox, or contact us to enable this feature.

kyc.title: Onboard people
kyc.description: Know Your Customer (KYC) is the obligation of banks, businesses, and other financial institutions to identify and authenticate a person's identity before doing business with them.
kyc.disabled-tooltip: You are not configured to create production KYC playbooks. Feel free to continue in sandbox, or contact us to enable this feature.

kyb.title: Onboard businesses and their beneficial owners
kyb.description: Know Your Business (KYB) is the obligation to verify the identity of any entity that you do business with.
kyb.disabled-tooltip: You are not configured to create production KYB playbooks. Feel free to continue in sandbox, or contact us to enable this feature.

id-doc.title: ID Document & Selfie only
id-doc.description: Users will upload and validate images of their ID documents (passport, driver's license, etc.) and optionally if requested, collect a selfie and verify it matches the document.
id-doc.disabled-tooltip: You are not configured to create production ID Document playbooks. Feel free to continue in sandbox, or contact us to enable this feature.

passkeys-more.title: More about passkeys
passkeys-more.content:
Passkey authentication simplifies the login process on iOS and Android devices, eliminating the need for traditional passwords. 
When we detect an already onboarded user wants to log-in, we will prompt them with a passkey challenge to sign-in to your platform. 
This means fewer password-related headaches and enhanced security for all your customers’ online accounts. 
This service has a cost based on the number of auth'd users.

verification-checks.subtitle: Configure which verification checks will be performed with the collected identity data.

aml-monitoring.title: Anti-Money Laundering (AML)
aml-monitoring.missing-selection: You must choose one of OFAC, PEP or Adverse Media.

aml.label: Enhanced AML monitoring
aml.hint: Continuous monitoring, governmental watchlists, PEP and adverse media

ofac.label: Office of Foreign Assets Control (OFAC)
ofac.hint: An agency within the U.S. Department of the Treasury that is responsible for administering and enforcing economic and trade sanctions against targeted foreign countries, organizations, and individuals

pep.label: Politically Exposed Person (PEP)
pep.hint: An individual who has been entrusted with a prominent public function

adverse-media.label: Adverse media
adverse-media.hint: Negative or unfavorable information about individuals, entities, or organizations that could indicate potential involvement in financial crimes, corruption, or other illicit activities

footer.label: Note:
footer.content: we run AML checks at the time of onboarding and keep doing it periodically for all of your users onboarded through Footprint.

disabled-tooltip.must-collect-beneficial-owners: You must collect beneficial owners' information to enable AML monitoring.
You must collect beneficial owners' information to enable KYC checks.
disabled-tooltip.must-collect-id-doc: You must collect ID document information to disable KYC checks.
